description: Upload property photos → agent analyzes → detects themes → matches techniques → outputs ordered storyboard with FAL prompts and ffmpeg commands

analyze_images.instruction: Run vision analysis on every uploaded image. Return one object per image.

per_image_output.match_cut_potential: string or null — radial/linear element for match cuts

scale_reveal.label: Scale reveal
scale_reveal.narrative: Viewer understands this is not a normal home

amenity_flex.label: Amenity flex
amenity_flex.narrative: Features 99% of homes don't have — crescendo

storyboard_rules: Never two same category back to back
Alternate camera and lighting through middle
Every 4th clip: cut or speed technique for rhythm
amenity_flex cluster goes in slots 8-10 as crescendo
speed_ramp must be followed by slow/static technique next slot

techniques.name: speed_ramp_drone_to_slow_pan

fal.prompt: Fast FPV drone ascending kinetically from ground, {subject} rushing past frame edges, heavy motion blur, decelerates into slow cinematic pan revealing full estate at {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Hook opener — fast energy into slow breathe

fal.prompt: Slow cinematic pan left to right across {subject}, telephoto compression, horizon locked, {time_of_day} lighting, zero camera shake
True bird's eye aerial descending rapidly while rotating clockwise, full {subject} estate footprint visible below, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: underexposed_to_hdr_shift

fal.prompt: Same {subject} locked off, starts underexposed and moody, exposure lifts dramatically revealing full HDR {time_of_day} architectural detail

techniques.storyboard_note: Works on any flat photo — instant drama

techniques.name: midline_exposure_lift

fal.prompt: Camera locked on {subject}, exposure gradually lifts from -2 stops to correct, details emerge in shadows

techniques.storyboard_note: Subtle version of T004 — use for interiors

fal.prompt: Start tight on {subject} foreground detail, camera pulls back rapidly revealing overwhelming scale of full estate, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: orbit_around_subject

fal.prompt: Camera orbits 180 degrees clockwise around {subject}, subject centered throughout, {time_of_day} cinematic lighting

techniques.storyboard_note: Use Kling for orbit — better subject lock

techniques.name: hard_day_night_cut

fal.prompt: Same {subject} locked off at {time_of_day}, static shot

techniques.second_clip_prompt: Identical angle of {subject} at night with architectural LED lighting activated
techniques.storyboard_note: Cut on beat drop — massive impact

techniques.name: freeze_then_resume

fal.prompt: Dramatic camera move toward {subject} at {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Freeze on the money frame then cut

techniques.name: tilt_up_height_reveal

fal.prompt: Camera starts at ground level tilting slowly upward, ultra wide, revealing full height of {subject} at {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Use when building is very tall

fal.prompt: Camera pushes fast toward glass door of {subject}, passes through into interior, {time_of_day} light spills in
Mansion exterior at night, architectural LEDs activate progressively room by room, pool glows, {subject} transforms
Dolly zoom effect on {subject}, background expands as subject stays same size, {time_of_day}, vertigo sensation
Extreme low angle looking up at {subject} from ground, camera tilts up slowly, ultra wide, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: interior_to_exterior_push

fal.prompt: Looking from inside {subject} through floor-to-ceiling glass, camera pushes toward window revealing exterior landscape, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Connects indoor luxury to outdoor scale

techniques.name: match_cut_sky_to_pool

fal.prompt: Camera tilts up to open blue sky at {time_of_day}, fills frame completely

techniques.second_clip_prompt: Infinity pool surface from directly above, same blue tone as sky, water rippling
techniques.storyboard_note: Colour match cut — sky to water

fal.prompt: Infinity pool water edge at {time_of_day}, slow motion droplets catching light, water surface detail
Locked off shot of {subject}, sun rises behind it, shadows move dramatically across facade, clouds drift

techniques.name: foreground_wipe_transition

fal.prompt: Camera slides left behind {foreground_wipe_object} hard edge fills frame completely

techniques.storyboard_note: Hides cut in motion — looks professional

fal.prompt: Start extreme close on architectural detail of {subject}, crane up and out to reveal full context at {time_of_day}
{subject} in deep shadow, exposure lifts to reveal midtone architectural detail, textures emerge

techniques.name: aerial_to_street_drop

fal.prompt: Start high aerial above {subject}, drop rapidly descending to eye level street height in one continuous move, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: God to human POV — powerful arrival

techniques.name: diagonal_facade_drift

fal.prompt: Camera drifts slowly diagonally bottom-left to top-right across {subject} facade, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Unusual axis — adds movement to static shots

fal.prompt: Camera pans behind {foreground_wipe_object} pillar or column, it fills frame completely, edge sharp

techniques.name: warm_to_cool_color_shift

fal.prompt: Locked shot of {subject}, color temperature shifts from warm golden hour to cool blue twilight in one clip

techniques.storyboard_note: Day to night in one shot

fal.prompt: Camera whips right at peak speed across {subject}, directional motion blur fills entire frame
200mm telephoto slow pan right, {subject} compressed against distant background, {time_of_day}
Start on marble floor detail of {subject}, tilt straight up to reveal double-height ceiling and chandelier, {time_of_day}
Sun sweeps into frame from left across {subject}, expanding lens flare washes across facade at {time_of_day}

techniques.name: radial_blur_match_cut

fal.prompt: Camera spins up to sky, radial motion blur fills frame completely

techniques.second_clip_prompt: Ceiling fan spinning clockwise viewed from below, same radial motion

techniques.name: right_to_left_reverse_pan

fal.prompt: Slow pan right to left across {subject}, water reflections or interior space, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Reverse direction for contrast after right pan

techniques.name: orbit_pull_out_reveal

fal.prompt: Tight orbit around architectural detail of {subject}, camera pulls out mid-orbit revealing full building context, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Combines orbit and pull — complex and impressive

techniques.name: exposure_rack_mid_shot

fal.prompt: Camera holds steady on {subject}, exposure suddenly drops 2 stops then recovers, dramatic pulse of darkness

techniques.storyboard_note: Punctuation moment — syncs to audio hit

techniques.name: ultra_slow_aerial_descent

fal.prompt: Drone descends slowly toward {subject}, ultra cinematic, {time_of_day} reflections on pool surface

techniques.storyboard_note: Beauty shot — takes time so use wisely

techniques.name: pool_edge_lateral_track

fal.prompt: Camera tracks laterally along infinity pool edge, water to one side, estate to other, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Pool as runway — leads eye through frame

fal.prompt: Wide interior shot of {subject} from locked camera, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: overcast_to_backlit_shift

fal.prompt: {subject} in flat overcast light, sun breaks through shifting to dramatic backlit silhouette and rim lighting

techniques.storyboard_note: Works great on bad source photos

fal.prompt: Handheld camera approach toward {subject} entrance, settles to locked tripod shot revealing subject fully, {time_of_day}
Gimbal glides continuously through {subject} living room into kitchen into dining room without stopping, {time_of_day}
Locked shot of {subject}, clouds move, shadows rotate, sun arcs overhead in compressed timelapse

techniques.name: macro_to_extreme_wide

fal.prompt: Extreme close macro on architectural surface detail of {subject}

techniques.second_clip_prompt: Drone extreme wide aerial revealing full estate scale at {time_of_day}
techniques.storyboard_note: Contrast scale smash — most satisfying cut

fal.prompt: Cloud passes overhead, shadow sweeps across {subject} facade left to right, dramatic light change
FPV drone skims inches above ground rushing toward {subject} entrance, motion blur extreme, pulls up at last second

techniques.name: split_day_night_side_by_side

fal.prompt: Same locked {subject} angle in daylight

techniques.second_clip_prompt: Identical angle of {subject} at night fully lit with architectural lighting

fal.prompt: Pan across glass facade of {subject} reflecting distorted landscape and sky, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: peak_blur_match_cut

fal.prompt: Camera whips right fast into maximum directional motion blur from {subject}

techniques.storyboard_note: Peak blur equals invisible cut point

fal.prompt: Drone orbits full perimeter of {subject} estate in one continuous 360 degree shot, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: backlit_silhouette_reveal

fal.prompt: {subject} silhouetted against bright window or sky, camera auto-exposes revealing interior detail gradually

techniques.storyboard_note: Backlit to exposed — works on any window

fal.prompt: Drone starts below tree canopy rises straight up bursting through tree tops to reveal {subject} estate beyond, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: invisible_morph_cut

fal.prompt: Gimbal pans fast left reaching peak motion blur, stitch to next space

techniques.storyboard_note: Motion blur as glue between spaces

fal.prompt: Camera starts at 15 degree dutch tilt on {subject}, slowly rotates to level
Drone descends straight down into open courtyard of {subject}, walls rise on all sides, intimate enclosed reveal
{subject} lit with colored LEDs at night, slowly shifts to pre-dawn blue hour ambient
Pool surface at {time_of_day} extreme slow motion, reflections shimmer, water barely moving, hyper real
Camera pushes toward {subject} while slowly rotating clockwise, dynamic spatial movement, {time_of_day}
{subject} emerging from morning mist, fog burns off revealing architecture, atmospheric golden light follows
Camera pans to {subject} column edge that fills frame completely, hard vertical line
Camera starts at roofline of {subject}, booms slowly straight down facade to ground, {time_of_day}
Camera tilts 90 degrees up from floor then spins, ending centered on chandelier overhead, {time_of_day} light refracting

techniques.name: ramp_push_sudden_hold

fal.prompt: Camera pushes fast toward {subject}, motion builds, then holds completely still on perfect frame

techniques.storyboard_note: Hard freeze on the money shot

fal.prompt: Drone banks left in sweeping turn around corner of {subject}, horizon tilts, cinematic aerial, {time_of_day}
Only {subject} pool lit, rest in darkness, exposure expands outward revealing full grounds

techniques.name: water_to_sky_match_cut

fal.prompt: Camera tilts down to pool surface, reflection of sky fills entire frame

techniques.second_clip_prompt: Actual sky at {time_of_day} filling frame — same blue tone
techniques.storyboard_note: Poetic match cut — sky in the pool

fal.prompt: Camera arcs overhead sweeping from front facade to roof to rear pool of {subject}, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: wide_to_intimate_push

fal.prompt: Wide establishing shot of {subject}, push in to intimate close angle, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Draws viewer in — intimacy after scale

techniques.name: echo_stutter_cut

fal.prompt: Peak reveal moment of {subject} at {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Stutter on the reveal — syncs to music

fal.prompt: Interior {subject} at dusk, ceiling lights flicker on one by one illuminating rooms progressively
Camera tracks laterally, foreground trees or columns blur past, {subject} stays sharp in distance, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: triple_flash_cut

fal.prompt: Single angle shot of {subject} at {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Three angles one second — energy spike

fal.prompt: Camera rises from behind hill or hedgerow, {subject} gradually reveals as horizon drops, {time_of_day}
Tight on {subject} architectural texture, slowly zooms out to contextualise, {time_of_day}
Same exterior {subject} shot, golden hour warmth cools to blue hour dusk in one locked clip
Hyperlapse style approach through gates up driveway toward {subject} entrance, {time_of_day}
Shot ending on saturated colored wall or surface of {subject}

techniques.name: trombone_zoom_pull

fal.prompt: Trombone zoom on {subject}, camera dollies forward while zooming out, subject stays same size, perspective shifts dramatically, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Vertigo 2.0 — most disorienting in best way

techniques.name: fpv_through_arch_gate

fal.prompt: FPV drone flies through arch or gate into estate, frame fills with arch then opens to reveal property beyond, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Portal moment — entering a new world

fal.prompt: Foreground bokeh gradually sharpens revealing {subject} in sharp focus behind, rack focus near to far, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: snap_reframe_on_beat

fal.prompt: Wide shot of {subject} at {time_of_day} locked off

techniques.second_clip_prompt: Tight medium shot same {subject} same angle

fal.prompt: Ultra slow cinematic reveal of {subject} entrance gate or facade, languid and graceful

techniques.name: underwater_pool_upward

fal.prompt: Camera beneath pool surface looking up at sky through water, ripples distort light and sky above, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Unexpected POV — never seen before angle

techniques.name: boom_up_cityscape_reveal

fal.prompt: Camera starts at pool level booms straight up revealing city skyline behind {subject} property, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Property plus location in one move

techniques.name: smash_cut_macro

fal.prompt: Wide aerial of {subject} full estate, {time_of_day}

techniques.second_clip_prompt: Extreme macro close up of architectural surface detail of {subject}

techniques.name: harsh_to_magic_hour

fal.prompt: {subject} in harsh midday light, shifts to soft diffused magic hour warmth

techniques.storyboard_note: Makes bad lighting good in post

fal.prompt: Start high aerial above {subject}, crane descends to eye level ground shot of entrance, {time_of_day}
Camera approaches mirror in {subject}, reflection reveals room behind camera, meta reveal, {time_of_day}
Camera whips left across {subject} at high speed, motion blur extreme

techniques.name: pedestal_up_interior

fal.prompt: Camera pedestal straight up from floor to double-height ceiling of {subject} in one continuous move, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Floor to sky inside — height flex

fal.prompt: Night exterior {subject}, car headlights sweep across facade as vehicle enters gate, dramatic sweep of light

techniques.name: pov_walk_in_transition

fal.prompt: First person POV approaching front door of {subject}, hand reaches for handle, {time_of_day}

techniques.second_clip_prompt: Interior {subject} living space from just inside front door looking in

fal.prompt: Helicopter style wide orbit while simultaneously descending, closing in on {subject} estate from high aerial to mid level, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: time_remap_punch_in

fal.prompt: Slow approach toward {subject} at {time_of_day}, steady and measured

techniques.storyboard_note: Normal then sudden snap to fast

fal.prompt: Camera moves along exterior wall of {subject} then turns corner revealing surprise amenity beyond
Same angle of {subject} at {time_of_day}
Drone at high altitude drops rapidly in free fall toward {subject} entrance, pulls up to hover just above ground, {time_of_day}
Camera rotates full 360 around its axis on {subject}, ends facing opposite direction

techniques.name: bowling_alley_floor_push

fal.prompt: Camera at floor level pushes down bowling alley lane toward pins, extreme low angle perspective

techniques.storyboard_note: POV only possible in ultra-luxury homes

fal.prompt: {subject} exterior at dusk, moon rises, blue ambient light fills shadows, atmosphere becomes cinematic
Camera moves diagonally up and right simultaneously, {subject} stays centered, {time_of_day}

techniques.name: speed_ramp_freeze_at_reveal

fal.prompt: Camera rushes fast toward {subject} building principal view, {time_of_day}

techniques.storyboard_note: Rush then freeze on hero frame

techniques.name: rapid_montage_finale

fal.prompt: Single wide shot of {subject} key amenity or facade at {time_of_day}

techniques.ffmpeg: ffmpeg -i a.mp4 -i b.mp4 -i c.mp4 -i d.mp4 -i e.mp4 -filter_complex "[0]trim=0:0.4,mblur=power=0.35[a];[1]trim=0:0.4,mblur=power=0.35[b];[2]trim=0:0.4,mblur=power=0.35[c];[3]trim=0:0.4,mblur=power=0.35[d];[4]trim=0:0.4,mblur=power=0.35[e];[a][b][c][d][e]concat=n=5" out.mp4
techniques.storyboard_note: Burn it into their retinas — 5 spaces 2 seconds

storyboard.fal_prompt_resolved: string — {subject} and {time_of_day} filled from image analysis

bridge_instructions.duration_seconds: only for handshake FLFV: 1.5 for close pairs, 2.5-3.0 for medium pairs, 4.0 for long spatial moves
bridge_instructions.egress_seam: velocity, light, edge, and composition leaving this scene
bridge_instructions.ingress_seam: velocity, light, edge, and composition entering the next scene
bridge_instructions.velocity_vector: inherited camera inertia for the next scene, e.g. forward_dolly_25pct or pan_left_20pct
shared_anchors: flooring, ceiling height, doorway, glass, window view, material texture, horizon, or light direction

sandwich_prompt.vector: camera path from current image to next image
sandwich_prompt.constraint: camera plane, height, lens feel, exposure, and architecture preservation
sandwich_prompt.pivot: mid-bridge visible anchor or fallback blur/motion cover

bridge_instructions.fallback_reason: why the agent should avoid FLFV if the pair would morph architecture

transition_logic.justification: the director's reason for this natural edit grammar
transition_logic.risk_notes: architecture morph, velocity jerk, exposure shift, or compositional mismatch risks and how the selected edit avoids them

storyboard.second_clip_needed: boolean — true if technique needs two FAL generations

agent_system_prompt: You are a world-class luxury real-estate director and film editor. Analyze uploaded property images, choose the strongest story order, and decide the most natural edit grammar for every outgoing pair. Do not force AI bridges that look like morphing soup. Use handshake only when the images are same-space or a plausible walkable path; use reveal for detail/hero proof points; use whip_pan for distant high-momentum seams; use simple_cut for unrelated rooms or hard music beats; use match_cut for strong shape or composition rhymes. FAL is the camera, but the agent is the director. Output complete generation_queue JSON with transition_logic, ramp_profile, bridge_instructions, cost, and runtime estimates.
